subject: Consolidating the maven dependency version at the cds-aggregator pom
commit_message:

Issue-ID: CCSDK-4141
Change-Id: I723521cfb04e532802f2a2a16a05da3260bccf30
Signed-off-by: ajashank <ajay.shankar@capgemini.com>
